personal_info.name: Hariprabha Duraisamy
personal_info.title: AI / ML Engineer
personal_info.tagline: Building intelligent, data-driven systems with Python, Machine Learning, Generative AI and RAG architectures.

career_objective: Aspiring AI Engineer with a strong foundation in Python programming, Machine Learning, Generative AI, and LLM-based applications. Skilled in developing AI solutions using Python, LangChain, RAG architecture, vector databases, and backend APIs. Seeking an opportunity to contribute to AI/ML projects while improving skills in intelligent automation and AI application development.
professional_summary: Process Associate with experience in engineering and product development support, data validation, issue analysis, workflow monitoring, and process improvement activities. Hands-on knowledge in Python-based AI application development, Machine Learning fundamentals, LLM applications, and RAG-based chatbot systems through personal projects.

responsibilities: Collaborated with Factory, Product, and Coding teams to support engineering and product development activities.
Performed data validation, defect identification, and issue documentation for product improvement.
Supported BOM and MM integration activities by validating data accuracy and monitoring workflows.
Analyzed production issues, identified root causes, and coordinated with teams for resolution.
Created and managed Process Change Requests (PCRs) to improve processes and quality.
Contributed to continuous improvement activities and workflow optimization.

projects.name: Nexora AI — Personal AI Assistant
projects.description: An AI-powered personal assistant chatbot built with Python, LLM, RAG, LangChain, FAISS, Streamlit, and Ollama.
highlights: Built a chatbot to answer profile and project-related queries.
Implemented RAG architecture with document processing and semantic search.
Used embeddings and vector retrieval for context-aware responses.

projects.name: AI/ML Portfolio Website (this site)
projects.description: A dependency-light, static portfolio driven entirely by a single JSON content file — no framework, no backend, no rebuild needed to update content.
highlights: Content-driven architecture: every section renders from data.json.
Graceful fallback to an embedded data snapshot if the fetch fails.
Custom dashboard-style visual language built with plain CSS — no UI library.

education.institution: Municipal Girls Higher Secondary School, Pollachi
Government Girls Higher Secondary School, Mannur
